title: Project Manager Business Intelligence Wholesale & Operations
required_skills: Agile project management methodologies and toolset
Cross-functional project co-leadership (quality, timeline, scope, budget)
Stakeholder communication across business and tech
BI project management governance and toolsets
bonus_skills: Degree in Business Administration or Business Informatics
matched_skills: Agile project management: Hapag-Lloyd sprint ceremonies, JIRA tooling
Stakeholder communication: HSBC C-suite reporting, cross-functional coordination across 6 workstreams
KPI framework and reporting: Hapag-Lloyd KPI/performance reporting, HSBC burn-rate dashboards
Project tracking and governance: HSBC PMO — risk escalation, status reports, prioritisation
Power BI PL-300 certified — BI tooling knowledge
missing_skills: BI solution architecture or data modelling knowledge
Direct BI project management governance experience
core_responsibilities: Co-manage multiple BI projects within Wholesale and Operations landscape
Support project planning, execution and monitoring progress
Manage operational and strategic data needs with key users
Define BI requirements towards technical backends
Create and maintain documentation for BI solutions
Support PM toolset and establish BI solution stability framework
Collaborate with stakeholders on BI roadmap planning
recommended_emphasis: Power BI PL-300 certification — direct BI credential, positions Boru as technically credible for BI project management
HSBC multi-workstream programme coordination as evidence of structured project co-management
Hapag-Lloyd KPI reporting aligned with BI project reporting cadence responsibilities
ECE Group reporting optimisation (spreadsheet automation, progress reports) as documentation/reporting experience
Agile delivery + JIRA for PM toolset proficiency
summary: Score 63.2 (moderate match). Boru's Power BI certification and KPI reporting experience are strong differentiators for a BI project manager role. The agile PM and cross-functional coordination experience translates well. Key gaps are wholesale/logistics domain knowledge and hands-on BI architecture — these are listed as 'plus' factors. Recommend applying with Power BI cert prominently featured and framing HSBC budget dashboards / Hapag-Lloyd analytics reporting as BI delivery experience.
